name: caushell-claude
description: Session-aware shell guardrails for Claude Code backed by the Caushell runtime.

hook_path.title: caushell-claude-hook path
hook_path.description: Optional explicit path to the native caushell-claude-hook executable. If unset, caushell-claude uses CAUSHELL_CLAUDE_HOOK_PATH, caushell-claude-hook on PATH, CAUSHELL_REPO_ROOT, or a source checkout target/debug path.

runtime_path.title: caushell path
runtime_path.description: Optional explicit path to caushell. If unset, caushell-claude resolves caushell from PATH.

store_root.title: Session store root
store_root.description: Directory where Caushell persists Claude session events and snapshots

socket_root.title: Socket root
socket_root.description: Directory for per-workspace Caushell daemon sockets and logs
